I need it to be known that I am fucking obsessed with crazy bitches. Maybe it's obvious, given my closet full of murder scenarios.

I would sacrifice the entire west coast to get some psycho to genuinely love me. "World peace or psycho fucker" bitch you know my answer

Okay so, played Wuwa. My PC decided it really liked the Devotion LMG from Apex, so its performance on games just gets exponentially better as a singular play session gets longer. Fuckin' yippie. Anywho, got cucked by Verina after using 60 pulls trying to get Lynae. I don't know what mythical handjob I gave to have 60 pulls saved up from my previous two hours of play, but I guess it doesn't matter now. Combat is decent. Ain't Zenless, but at least it ain't Genshin either. Only actual grievance I even have is that it's an open world game where I only care about one character that I don't even have yet. Once Lynae's banner ends, my ass is never booting this shit up again, even if I got her.

Next bot:

"My wife be losin' her mind sometimes"
